features: CMV promoter | CMV IE94 promoter | minimal CMV promoter | mCMV promoter | CMVd1 promoter | CMVd2 promoter | CMVd3 promoter
notes: CMV-family promoter alone is the simplest 5' boundary of a mammalian Pol II cassette.

features: CMV enhancer + chicken β-actin promoter + (chimeric intron | hybrid intron | β-globin intron)
notes: CAG cassette: CMV enhancer → chicken β-actin promoter → rabbit β-globin intron. Extremely strong, widely used in AAV and transgenics. All three elements in this order make the call near-certain.

features: EF-1α promoter | EF-1α core promoter | mEF-1α promoter
notes: EF-1α promoter; the full-length version typically brings EF-1α intron A which further supports the call.
Full EF-1α promoter with its natural first intron. Stronger than the core promoter alone and resistant to silencing.
Human/mouse PGK promoter; moderate-strength ubiquitous mammalian promoter, common in lenti.
Human ubiquitin C promoter; ubiquitous expression, resistant to silencing.
SV40 early promoter; often used for selection markers rather than payload.

features: SFFV promoter | MSCV promoter | RSV promoter
notes: Retroviral LTR-derived promoters; common in lenti/retro for strong hematopoietic expression.
HSV TK promoter; weak constitutive, often paired with selectable markers.
Neuron-specific promoters; the neuronal tropism is diagnostic in AAV neuroscience contexts.

features: TRE3G promoter | TRE3GS promoter | TRE3GV promoter | tight TRE promoter | bidirectional TRE promoter | TRE3G BI promoter
notes: Tet-responsive promoters; implies a separate Tet-On/Off transactivator cassette elsewhere.
CMV enhancer preceding a non-CMV promoter (e.g. in CAG) substantially boosts transcription.

features: chimeric intron | hybrid intron | β-globin intron | SV40 intron | small t intron | large T intron | CMV intron | CMV intron A | EF-1α intron A | mEF-1α intron
notes: An intron between the promoter and CDS boosts mammalian expression via mRNA export/stability. Common but not required.
Kozak consensus surrounding the ATG — ensures efficient translation initiation. Often implicit and unannotated.
Translation-enhancing 5' UTR; used in some mRNA-like mammalian expression cassettes.
WPRE boosts transgene mRNA levels; 3' of CDS, before polyA. Very common in lenti/AAV Pol II cassettes.
IRES separates two CDSs in a bicistronic cassette — implies a two-ORF module.
2A self-cleaving peptide; produces stoichiometric co-expression of two proteins from a single ORF. In-frame is essential.

features: Igκ leader | IgH signal sequence | IgM signal sequence | IL-2 signal sequence | tPA signal/pro sequence | hGH signal sequence | BiP signal sequence | insulin signal sequence
notes: Mammalian secretion signal peptide fused N-terminally to the CDS — indicates a secreted-protein module.
Bovine growth hormone polyA; strong/compact, the default in AAV and many transient vectors.
SV40 late polyA; the other default. Common in selection cassettes and older vectors.
Human growth hormone polyA.
Rabbit β-globin polyA; strong, often paired with CAG promoter.
HSV TK polyA; typically with TK or PGK promoter in selection cassettes.
PGK polyA; often paired with PGK promoter in selection cassettes.
EF-1α polyA; paired with EF-1α promoter.
Generic annotation; lower weight due to ambiguity.

features: [5' boundary] -> [optional intron] -> [optional Kozak] -> CDS -> [optional WPRE] -> [3' boundary]
notes: Canonical mammalian Pol II cassette. Full order match is near-diagnostic.
T7+RBS upstream of the CDS indicates a bacterial T7 expression module, not mammalian Pol II.

features: U6 promoter | H1 promoter | 7SK promoter | H1-2O2 promoter | TREmod/U6 promoter
notes: Pol III promoters drive short non-coding RNAs. Transcription starts at a defined +1 within the promoter.

features: gRNA scaffold | tracrRNA | Nm gRNA scaffold | St1 gRNA scaffold | Cj gRNA scaffold | RfxCas13d DR30 | RfxCas13d DR36 | crRNA leader
notes: Guide RNA scaffold marks the cassette as CRISPR sgRNA. The 20 nt before it is the spacer.

features: pol III terminator (6+ T run) | TTTTTT
notes: A run of 6+ T residues terminates Pol III transcription. Rarely annotated as a feature but sequence-detectable.
These are Pol II translation/termination elements; their presence argues against a Pol III cassette.
T7 promoter — requires T7 RNA polymerase host strain (BL21(DE3) or plasmid-encoded T7 RNAP). Very common in pET vectors.
T5 phage promoter; used in pQE/pTrcHis-style vectors, lac-repressible with lac operators.
Hybrid trp-lac promoters; IPTG-inducible via lacI.
Wild-type lac (weak) or the stronger UV5 variant; IPTG-inducible.
Arabinose-inducible pBAD; tightly titratable. Requires araC regulator elsewhere.
Rhamnose-inducible; similar to araBAD but orthogonal.

features: tet promoter | PLtetO-1 promoter | tetA promoter | tetR/tetA promoters
notes: Tet-responsive bacterial promoter; aTc-inducible via TetR.
Anderson collection constitutive promoters; standard in iGEM / synthetic biology.
Other inducible/constitutive bacterial promoters.
Phage promoters used mainly for in-vitro transcription; if RBS follows, also used for expression.

location_constraint: RBS within 5-15 bp of CDS start
notes: Shine-Dalgarno/RBS is mandatory for bacterial translation. Distance to ATG is critical (optimal ~7 bp).
Explicit Shine-Dalgarno annotation; equivalent to RBS.

features: lac operator | lac operator (symmetric) | tet operator
notes: Operators embedded in/near the promoter enable inducible control.

features: pelB signal sequence | OmpA signal peptide | DsbA | DsbC
notes: Periplasmic secretion signal; indicates a periplasmic expression module (pET-22b-style).
Translation enhancers for T7 expression; help initiation on difficult ORFs.

features: MBP | NusA | SUMO | GB1 | HP-thioredoxin | His patch thio | CBD
notes: Solubility/fusion tags fused to the N-terminus of the CDS.

features: Twin-Strep-tag | Strep-Tag II | S-Tag | AviTag™ | HaloTag® | SNAP-tag® | CLIP-tag™ | protein G
notes: Affinity tags; weak standalone evidence but support bacterial expression when combined with RBS/promoter.

features: TEV site | HRV 3C site | thrombin site | Factor Xa site | enterokinase site | Genenase™ I site | WELQut site
notes: Protease cleavage sites between fusion tag and CDS; very common in bacterial expression vectors.
T7 transcription terminator; pairs with T7 promoter.

features: rrnB T1 terminator | rrnB T2 terminator
notes: E. coli rrnB terminators; very common in bacterial expression vectors, often as T1T2 tandem.

features: lambda t0 terminator | λ tL3 terminator
notes: Lambda phage terminators.

features: fd terminator | T3Te terminator | tonB terminator | his operon terminator | trpC terminator | bacterial terminator | soxR terminator
notes: Other bacterial intrinsic terminators.

features: Kozak sequence | WPRE | bGH poly(A) signal | SV40 poly(A) signal
notes: Mammalian-specific elements argue against bacterial expression.
AcMNPV polyhedrin very late promoter; the default high-expression promoter in Bac-to-Bac and related systems.
Alternative very late baculoviral promoter; often used for dual-expression alongside polh.
Late baculoviral promoters; earlier onset than polh/p10.
gp64 envelope promoter; used for surface display fusions.
Immediate-early baculoviral promoters; active throughout infection.
OpMNPV immediate-early promoters; active constitutively in insect cells without infection. Used in pIB/V5-His, pIZ/V5-His for STABLE insect expression.
Drosophila actin 5C promoter; used in S2 cell stable expression (pAc5.1/V5-His).
AcMNPV homologous region 5 enhancer; strongly boosts IE1-driven expression. Often paired.
Native polh 5' UTR retained in transfer vectors.
Insect cells also use Kozak-like context.

features: GP64 signal sequence | GP64 mature domain | melittin signal sequence | AKH signal sequence | BiP signal sequence | α-amylase signal sequence | insulin signal sequence
notes: Insect-compatible secretion signals — diagnostic for secreted-protein modules in insect systems.

features: TEV site | HRV 3C site | thrombin site | Factor Xa site | WELQut site
notes: Protease sites for tag removal; supporting.

features: capTEV™ | MBP | SUMO | His tag | Twin-Strep-tag | HaloTag® | V5 tag | HA-L | HA-R
notes: Fusion/affinity tags; weak support.
SV40 polyA is the most common 3' boundary in baculoviral transfer vectors because insect cells process it efficiently.
OpMNPV IE-2 polyA — diagnostic for stable insect cell vectors (pIB, pIZ) paired with OpIE promoters.
Drosophila hsp70 polyA; typically paired with Ac5 promoter for S2 cells.
Native polh 3' UTR retained in some transfer vectors.

features: HSV TK poly(A) signal | bGH poly(A) signal
notes: Mammalian polyA signals also work in insect cells and are sometimes used; weaker evidence for insect-specific module.

features: [polh or p10 or OpIE promoter] -> [optional signal peptide] -> CDS -> [polyA]
notes: Canonical insect expression cassette.

features: CaMV 35S promoter | CaMV 35S promoter (enhanced) | minimal CaMV 35S promoter
notes: Cauliflower mosaic virus 35S promoter; the default constitutive promoter for dicots.
Maize ubiquitin promoter; the default constitutive promoter for monocots.
Rice actin 1 promoter; alternative monocot constitutive promoter.
Nopaline synthase / mannopine synthase promoters; weaker constitutive, commonly drive selectable markers rather than payload.
Hybrid 35S/pyruvate orthophosphate dikinase promoter.

features: AtU6 promoter | AtU6-1 promoter | OsU3 promoter
notes: Plant Pol III promoters driving sgRNAs for CRISPR in planta.
TMV omega 5' leader; translation enhancer, widely used in plant expression.
Plant translation-enhancing 5' UTRs.
Barley yellow dwarf virus 3' translation element; works with the 5' UTR for cap-independent translation.
Enhanced 35S with TMV Ω leader — high-expression plant module commonly used in transient agroinfiltration.
Plants prefer an A at -3; Kozak-like context applies.

features: chsA intron | IV2 intron | PDK intron | cat1 intron
notes: Plant introns can enhance expression (intron-mediated enhancement, IME).
Nopaline synthase terminator; the default plant polyA signal, paired with almost any plant promoter.
CaMV 35S polyA; often paired with the 35S promoter.
Octopine synthase terminator; orthogonal to NOS, useful in stacked cassettes to avoid repeat-induced silencing.
Heat shock 70 polyA; used in some plant vectors.

features: LB T-DNA repeat + RB T-DNA repeat
notes: Expression module must lie between the T-DNA borders to be stably transferred to the plant genome.

features: GAL1 promoter | GAL10 promoter | GAL1,10 promoter
notes: Galactose-inducible; the classic inducible S. cerevisiae promoter. GAL1,10 is bidirectional.

features: ADH1 promoter | adh1 promoter | ADH2 promoter
notes: ADH1 strong constitutive / ADH2 glucose-repressible.
Translation elongation factor 1; strong constitutive.
Glyceraldehyde-3-phosphate dehydrogenase; strong constitutive.
Alcohol oxidase 1 — diagnostic for Pichia pastoris methanol-inducible expression.
Copper-inducible metallothionein promoter.

features: nmt1 promoter | nmt1 P41 promoter | nmt1 P81 promoter
notes: S. pombe thiamine-repressible promoters (full/attenuated strengths).
Other inducible yeast promoters.
S. cerevisiae α-factor prepro-leader; diagnostic for secreted yeast expression (very common in Pichia).
Yeast Kozak context is loose; weak marker.
Cytochrome c terminator; the default S. cerevisiae terminator for heterologous expression.
ADH terminators; often paired with corresponding promoters.
Pichia pastoris AOX1 terminator; diagnostic with AOX1 promoter.
PGK1 terminator.
T7 promoter drives in vitro transcription of mRNA vaccine/therapeutic templates. Weaker than bacterial use because T7 alone is ambiguous.
Human/Xenopus β-globin 5' UTR is the standard mRNA-vaccine 5' UTR.
β-globin 3' UTR preceding the encoded polyA tail.

features: encoded polyA tract (>=80 A) | polyA tail
notes: Template-encoded polyA of ~80–120 A residues; terminates the IVT run after linearization.

features: T7 promoter -> 5' UTR -> Kozak -> CDS -> 3' UTR -> polyA tract
notes: Canonical IVT-mRNA layout — diagnostic when all elements in order.
